docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $608.00 FILED BY FOLSOM STREET ASSOCIATES DBA CROCKERS LOCKERS AS TO DEFENDANT MCBRIDE BERRI T CARE OF LOS ROBLES DEVELOPMENT CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MCBRIDE BERRI T CARE OF LOS ROBLES DEVELOPMENT CO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOLSOM STREET ASSOCIATES DBA CROCKERS LOCKERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCBRIDE BERRI T CARE OF LOS ROBLES DEVELOPMENT CO $608.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $616.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
